tasks.start: deno task build:client && deno run --allow-net --allow-read server.ts
tasks.dev: deno task build:client && watch:client && deno run --allow-net --allow-read --watch server.ts
tasks.fmt: deno fmt src/ && deno fmt server.ts && deno fmt client/ && deno fmt public/
tasks.lint: deno lint src/ && deno lint server.ts && deno lint client/ && deno lint public/
tasks.check: deno check src/ && deno check server.ts && deno check public/ && deno task typecheck:client
